message:
fix(content): correct all flywheel tool descriptions and stats

TLDR Tool Fixes:
- NTM: Fix tech stack from Bash to Go 1.25+ with Bubble Tea
- SLB: Complete rewrite - it's a two-person rule command approval
  CLI, not an agent launcher. Tech stack: Go/Bubble Tea/SQLite
- MCP Agent Mail: Fix tech stack from TypeScript/Node.js to
  Python 3.14+/FastMCP/FastAPI/SQLite
- UBS: Fix description - custom pattern-based scanner with 1000+
  rules, not wrapper around ESLint/Ruff/Clippy
- CM: Fix architecture from ACE framework to three-layer cognitive
  (Episodic/Working/Procedural). Tech stack: TypeScript/Bun
- DCG: Fix tech stack from Bash to Rust with SIMD acceleration
- GIIL: Complete rewrite - "Get Image from Internet Link" for
  iCloud downloads, not "Git Issue Import/Link"

Landing Page Fixes:
- Update flywheel tool count from 7 to 10 (siteConfig, heroStats,
  heroContent)
- Update project count from 30+ to 70+ for consistency
- Fix RU synergy reference (was pointing to old GIIL description)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
